profile.name: Nextracker Inc.
profile.description: Nextpower Inc. is a U.S.-headquartered solar technology and manufacturing company that provides intelligent, integrated solar tracker systems, software solutions, and related products for utility-scale and distributed generation solar power plants. The company specializes in advanced solar tracking systems like the NX Horizon low carbon tracker, electrical balance of system products, steel module frames, foundation solutions such as NX Earth Truss for challenging soils, and digital yield management and control software. Nextpower also develops utility-scale power conversion systems and offers remote monitoring capabilities through centers like its Nashville hub. It supports global solar deployments with manufacturing expansions in the U.S., including steel fabrication in Memphis and Tennessee, and joint ventures such as Nextpower Arabia for the Middle East and North Africa region. These initiatives emphasize localized supply chains, supply-chain optimization, and technologies that enhance energy output, durability, and environmental performance in solar projects across regions including the United States, Australia, Saudi Arabia, and beyond. Founded in 2013 and headquartered in Fremont, California, Nextpower plays a key role in advancing utility-scale clean energy infrastructure through its comprehensive technology platform.
